zh.lifeSummary: 當Jenkin Franklen於1515年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根高維爾時，他的父親John Franklin26歲，母親Elen Vychan21歲。他於1540年與Elen verch Rees Lloyd在威爾士格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根聖 萊森斯享年70歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jenkin Franklen于1515年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根高維爾时，他的父亲John Franklin26岁，母亲Elen Vychan21岁。他于1540年与Elen verch Rees Lloyd在威尔士格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根聖 萊森斯享年70岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德。

nameMeanings.name: Franklen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Franklin
meanings: English: status name from Middle English frankeleyn ‘freeman, freeholder, land-owner of free but not noble birth’ (Anglo-Norman French fraunclein). In general, he was a gentleman ranked above the main body of minor freeholders but below a knight or a member of the nobility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, such as   Frankel  .

History: The American statesman and scientist Benjamin Franklin (1706–90) was the son of Josiah Franklin, a chandler (dealer in soap and candles), who had emigrated c. 1682 from Ecton, Northamptonshire, to Boston, MA, where his son was born.

nameMeanings.name: Jenkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Jankin. This was a pet form of the boy's name Jan , with the diminutive suffix -kin. The modern given name is popular in Wales, where the surnames Jenkin and Jenkins are common.

en.lifeSummary: When Jenkin Franklen was born in 1515, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, John Franklin, was 26 and his mother, Elen Vychan, was 21. He married Elen verch Rees Lloyd in 1540, in Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1585, in Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jenkin Franklen est né en 1515, à Gower, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Franklin, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elen Vychan, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elen verch Rees Lloyd en 1540, à Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1585, à Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Slade, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jenkin Franklen 1515 in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Franklin 26 und seine Mutter Elen Vychan 21. Er hat 1540 in Glamorgan, Wales Elen verch Rees Lloyd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1585 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jenkin Franklen è nato il nel 1515 nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Franklin, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elen Vychan, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elen verch Rees Lloyd nel 1540, nel Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1585, nel Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Slade, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Jenkin Franklenが1515年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルで生まれた時，父John Franklinは26歳，母Elen Vychanは21歳であった。1540年にウェールズグラモーガンでElen verch Rees Lloydと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンサイント リサンスで70歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンスラドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jenkin Franklen(이)가 1515년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Franklin(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen Vychan(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1540년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Elen verch Rees Lloyd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 세인트 리스아스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건 슬라드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jenkin Franklen nasceu em 1515, em Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Franklin, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elen Vychan, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elen verch Rees Lloyd em 1540, em Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1585, em Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jenkin Franklen родился в 1515 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Franklin было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen Vychan, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elen verch Rees Lloyd в 1540 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1585 г. в местности сеинт литанс, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.Saint Lythans, Glamorganshire, Wales: Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jenkin Franklen nació en 1515, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, John Franklin, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elen Vychan, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elen verch Rees Lloyd en 1540, en Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1585, en Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
